headline: Three decades into cystic fibrosis fight, Boomer Esiason and his son Gunnar are winning
summary: After NFL quarterback Boomer Esiason's son was diagnosed with cystic fibrosis, it put a face on a little-known disease and marked the start of a public crusade.

headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Broadcom, AT&T, Vertex and InterGroup
summary: Broadcom leads today's top research reports as AI chip demand surges, while AT&T and Vertex navigate debt, churn and pipeline risks.
